title: Just Pet Bed
description: Adds a Pet Bed that respawns pets
body:
![Just Ped Bed Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/20880f5079cd8d3d9c2f41839528b386469cc0cc.png)

# 📖 About
This datapack adds a pet bed to the game, which can be crafted from two planks and two wool (16 variations in total, one for each wool color). If your pet has rested on it, then after its death it will respawn on it after one in-game day, similar to how the player respawns on a bed.

# 👀 Showcase
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/Kvs0oDhgQdg" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

# ❓ FAQ
Which pets can interact with the pet bed?
> Currently, wolves and cats can interact with the pet bed. You can also add other entities via a tag (see “For Developers”).

How can I stop my pet from being respawned?
> If you want to remove your pet's spawnpoint, you simply need to destroy the pet bed it is linked to.

# 🧑‍💻 For Developers
You can specify in the entity type tag (`pet_bed/tags/entity_type/pets.json`) pets from your mods that will be able to interact with the pet bed

# 🔗 Links
You can leave a comment on the PMC page!
